title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 413.139 - Taximeter increments
text:
413.139.  Taximeter increments. — The display of a taximeter shall be programmed to increment in uniform whole cent money values, at one-tenth of a mile intervals for distance, and at uniform time intervals.  The uniform intervals for distance and time apply to both the initial and subsequent intervals.
(L. 1998 H.B. 1856)
